changelog: Side-rail RIGHT-arrow → first card focus is now LOCKED IN with a strong cautionary code comment in tvFocusable so future changes don't reintroduce the bug.
BACK on the TV main home screen now pops the exit-confirm dialog (was accidentally lost during a refactor — restored).
Hush+ rolled back to a 'Coming Soon' teaser — users can scroll the pillars / addon preview but cannot launch any addon. HushXXX, HushVOD+, HushBooks, HushArcade, HushTube are all gated.
HushXXX deep-link routes (hushxxx/, mhushxxx/) are also blocked at the navigation layer as a defense-in-depth — anyone who hits those routes is silently popped back.
